---
title: 'Dear Her, 4/30/2020'
date: '2020-04-30T22:09:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '854676102356489431'
blogger_filename: '/2020/04/dear-her-4302020.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Dear Her'
---

Dear Her,<div><br></div><div>I wanted to tell you something...&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div><div>Just had a surreal experience...&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>My friend Dacia got married today via Facebook live. I watched the wedding at lunch.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>I've talked non-stop about finding my next partner for months now.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>But as I imagined myself standing there, I felt my chest tighten, and imagined a noose tightening around my neck.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Then I heard "It's a trap!"&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>And I felt suddenly very relieved to be single.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>I'm sure I'll feel differently when you arrive in my life.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>But this was a sobering day. I might just double down on enjoying Singleness for a while longer. Write some books, take some trips. I don't know.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>I'm still looking forward to meeting my you someday.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Just....</div><div><br></div><div>Not as eager...</div><div><br></div><div>What if I'm not as ready as I think I am?</div><div>What if I pick wrong?</div></div><div>What if you're disappointed in me?</div><div>What if we're miserable?</div><div>What if....... Etc.&nbsp;</div><div>What if you die too?&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>I'm sure things will work out if we may the right foundation, and build on it intentionally...&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>But....&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>I got scared today.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Maybe that's good. Maybe that means I'm moving to selfish wish to realistic planning. What does it really mean? What am I asking for? Is this what I want? Etc. It's getting real.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Your him,</div><div>Darrell&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588284476799813-0-bd7989389492.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588284476799813-0-bd7989389492.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div><div><br></div>
